# branch onto supports the spice.branchOnto.restack config.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2026-05-26T10:45:00Z'

# set up
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

git config spice.branchOnto.restack aboves

git add base1.txt
gs bc -m base1

git add move1.txt
gs bc -m move1

git add above1.txt
gs bc -m above1

# With branchOnto.restack=aboves,
# branch onto restacks the direct branch above the moved branch.
git checkout move1
gs branch onto main
stderr 'above1: moved upstack onto base1'
stderr 'move1: moved onto main'

gs ll -a
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/config-ll.txt

# An explicit CLI flag overrides the configured restack mode.
git checkout main
git add base2.txt
gs bc -m base2

git add move2.txt
gs bc -m move2

git add above2.txt
gs bc -m above2

git checkout move2
gs branch onto --restack=none main
stderr 'above2: retargeted upstack onto base2'
! stderr 'above2: moved upstack onto base2'
stderr 'move2: moved onto main'

gs ll -a
cmp stderr $WORK/golden/override-ll.txt

-- repo/base1.txt --
Base 1
-- repo/move1.txt --
Move 1
-- repo/above1.txt --
Above 1
-- repo/base2.txt --
Base 2
-- repo/move2.txt --
Move 2
-- repo/above2.txt --
Above 2
-- golden/config-ll.txt --
  ┏━□ above1
  ┃   35e266d above1 (now)
┏━┻□ base1
┃    18643f6 base1 (now)
┣━■ move1 ◀
┃   5ee462d move1 (now)
main
-- golden/override-ll.txt --
  ┏━□ above1
  ┃   35e266d above1 (now)
┏━┻□ base1
┃    18643f6 base1 (now)
┃ ┏━□ above2 (needs restack)
┃ ┃   89eb1d3 above2 (now)
┣━┻□ base2
┃    239cefd base2 (now)
┣━□ move1
┃   5ee462d move1 (now)
┣━■ move2 ◀
┃   122e24b move2 (now)
main
